text.title: pair-programming Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for pair-programming as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Keyboard hog: one person always drives.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Navigator disengages and learning stops; use a timer-based rotation.

failure-mode.description: Backseat driver: navigator dictates every keystroke.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Driver loses ownership and stops thinking; navigator should guide direction, not transcription.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Without think-aloud, the navigator cannot review intent; pair becomes two people on one computer.

failure-mode.description: Sycophancy: agent agrees with every design decision without pushback.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Agents lack the social authority of a senior engineer; periodically run a hostile-review subagent as counterweight.

failure-mode.description: Scope creep: agent finds adjacent issues and expands the task.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Pin scope in the journal; reject out-of-scope edits in the turn-end check.

failure-mode.description: Ping-pong cheating: agent writes test AND production code in the same turn.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Enforce turn-state in the journal; abort when violated.

failure-mode.description: Privacy: agent reads .env, secrets, customer data while exploring.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Pre-scope allowed paths; use a password-scrubber agent or exclude sensitive files from context.

failure-mode.description: Strong-style violation: agent has tools to Edit and will quietly use them.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Constrain via prompt; remove Edit/Write from allowed tools if possible.

failure-mode.description: Memory loss across compaction: decisions made hour 1 forgotten by hour 3.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Mitigate with .pair-journal.md re-read on each turn.
